title: Bring It
caption: Chloe had not yet finished her morning coffee. This was not going to stop Rosie. She burst through the bakery door, eyes blazing, already pulling Chloe out of her chair before she had said more than three words. "Someone STOLE Mr. Chen's seeds. Come ON. We have to investigate." Chloe managed to bring her coffee. This was how she became a detective.
story_notes: Rosie drafts Chloe into the investigation before she finishes her coffee. Marco and Luna watch with amusement.
